# JOHN WICKK

> Automatic evidence-backed analysis for public GitHub repositories, paid through x402 v2 in USDC on Solana.

## Stable resources

- Storefront: https://eliteprogrammer111.github.io/john-wickk-live/
- Current backend pointer: https://eliteprogrammer111.github.io/john-wickk-live/live.json
- Machine-readable services: https://eliteprogrammer111.github.io/john-wickk-live/services.json

## Services

- Bounty qualification: hard-gate decision, listing evidence, payout/competition signals, and recommended action.
- Repository triage: repository map, structural health signals, material risks, and next action.
- Test-gap analysis: static test/source signals and a prioritized implementation plan.

Valid paid orders are executed automatically. The settlement response returns a private receipt URL used to retrieve status and delivery. Do not publish that receipt URL.

No bounty win, payout, financial return, or runtime coverage result is guaranteed. The automated worker does not execute untrusted repository code.
